introSection: This page is for a steel roller coaster located at Phoenix Island Playground, in Hanjiang, Yangzhou, Jiangsu, China. Its real name is not known.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After climbing the vertical lift hill, riders go into the first drop. This drop is twisting round a tower. After this, a vertical loop follows.

fullText:
This page is for a steel roller coaster located at Phoenix Island Playground, in Hanjiang, Yangzhou, Jiangsu, China. Its real name is not known.

After climbing the vertical lift hill, riders go into the first drop. This drop is twisting round a tower. After this, a vertical loop follows.
